title: Update footer styling to white background with readable text

requirements.text: Change the footer background color from bg-gray-800 to bg-white in the Footer component

quotes: change the color of the footer background to bg-white

acceptanceCriteria: Footer background is visually white matching the header

requirements.text: Update footer text colors to ensure readability on white background (use dark text colors such as text-gray-800 or text-gray-900 for all footer text elements)

quotes: yes, change footer text color so it remains readable

acceptanceCriteria: All footer text is clearly readable against the white background
Footer text uses appropriate dark color classes
Social links and other interactive elements maintain sufficient contrast

requirements.text: Preserve all existing footer styling including padding, borders, layout structure, and spacing
acceptanceCriteria: All spacing between footer elements remains the same

constraints: Do not change footer layout, padding, borders, or structural elements
Maintain all existing footer content and links
